name: Coffee Almond Chocolate Blondies
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups Blanched Almonds, Sliced & Toasted, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. In a heavy large saucepan, stir together the brown sugar and butter over medium-low heat until they melt. Add the coffee liqueur and instant espresso powder and whisk to blend. Allow to cool.
4. Whisk in the eggs, one at a time, into the sugar mixture.
5. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Stir the dry ingredients into the batter until just combined.
7. Fold in the chopped almonds and stir in the chocolate chips.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until set.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
